Introducing SWE-Squad: Autonomous AI for Incident Management

SWE-Squad is an open-source, multi-agent platform that automates the full incident lifecycle — detection, triage, investigation, and resolution — using AI agents. Here's why we built it and how to get started.

May 16, 2025 SWE-Squad Team
announcementlaunchopen-source

Stability Gates: Preventing Regressions from AI Fixes

How SWE-Squad's stability gate mechanism validates AI-generated patches before they reach production, ensuring safe autonomous incident resolution.

March 5, 2025 Platform Team
engineeringreliabilitysafety

Model Routing: Matching AI Models to Tasks

How SWE-Squad routes different incident management tasks to the optimal AI model, balancing cost and quality across Haiku, Sonnet, and Opus.

February 10, 2025 Engineering Team
engineeringaimodel-routing
